title: Golden Roasted Saudi Arabian Date Skewers
description: A festive Saudi Arabian dish featuring caramel sauce and crunchy roasted dates, perfect for special occasions, this low-calorie-friendly recipe is a delicious and healthy treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the honey, caramel sauce, and water until well combined.
Add the pitted dates to the bowl and toss to coat with the honey caramel mixture.
Thread the coated dates onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each date.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving some space between each skewer.
Dot the top of each date with a small amount of unsalted butter.
Sprinkle the salt over the dates.
Roast the date skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until golden brown and caramelized.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
